introSection: Nyckelpigan is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Gröna Lund in Stockholm, Stockholm, Sweden. Nyckelpigan is Swedish for Ladybug.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Oval track layout. The ride differs a bit from normal Tivoli Smalls, mostly in the first bit, where the normal dip has been cut way shorter due to a rooftop being under this part of the coaster.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a Ladybug.

fullText:
Nyckelpigan is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Gröna Lund in Stockholm, Stockholm, Sweden. Nyckelpigan is Swedish for Ladybug.

Oval track layout. The ride differs a bit from normal Tivoli Smalls, mostly in the first bit, where the normal dip has been cut way shorter due to a rooftop being under this part of the coaster.

Green track and supports.

The train is designed to resemble a Ladybug.
